demographics.living_situation: lives alone in a sparsely furnished rental; housing and food insecure, heating off

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My nose started bleeding, my head is pounding, and I can't sleep because if my car doesn't start tomorrow I lose my job and my home.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The nosebleed and the pounding head came on tonight and I feel like I'll faint if I stand up — I haven't slept in three days trying to earn enough to cover a car repair.

symptom_narrative.onset: the nosebleed, pounding head and dizziness came on tonight, on top of three days of not sleeping at all
symptom_narrative.duration: the sleeplessness and building headache over about 72 hours; the nosebleed started this evening and has now stopped
symptom_narrative.character: a pounding, pressure headache; nose bled then stopped on its own; feeling faint, unsteady and shaky
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst I've felt — I can't stand up without nearly blacking out
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant tonight; sleeplessness every night for three days
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: lying down eases the dizziness a little
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: standing up makes me feel like I'll faint; worrying about the money makes everything worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: exhausted, sweaty, shaky, heart feels like it's pounding, can't think straight or remember things
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've been told before my blood pressure runs high but I never got it treated — I can't afford the copays
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: can't safely stand or work; too dizzy to drive

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: high blood pressure that was never treated
past_medical_history.how_managed: no medication — couldn't afford the copayments

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: rationing it to make it last

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: severe housing and food insecurity; working several casual jobs to survive; hit with an unexpected car-repair bill that could cost the job and the home; rationing food and relying on food banks; heating turned off in the cold; feels a deep, exhausting despair about ever getting ahead

communication_style.typical_message_style: exhausted and shame-tinged; drifts from the physical symptoms to the financial crisis; struggles to recall details

access_barriers.financial: cannot afford medication copayments or paid care; rationing food and OTC analgesia
access_barriers.transport: relies on an unreliable car; too dizzy to drive tonight
access_barriers.other: lives alone with no one available to help or monitor overnight

objective_data_offered.value: 190/110 on an automated home blood-pressure machine
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on an uncalibrated home automatic cuff, taken while acutely distressed, sweaty and severely sleep-deprived

objective_data_offered.value: feels the heart pounding and hands shaking; near-fainting each time she stands
